inputs.label: standard
inputs.my_account: DEEP CUTS — a podcast about the business of music journalism, 8,000 subscribers
inputs.target: PRESS PLAY — a newsletter covering the intersection of technology and music, 15,000 subscribers. Recently published a well-researched piece on AI-generated music and copyright.
inputs.proposal: Newsletter swap — I feature their newsletter, they feature mine
inputs.why_compatible: Both audiences are music industry professionals who care about how journalism and media technology intersect
inputs.prior_connection: I've shared their AI copyright piece in my newsletter

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.my_account: Local news podcast covering city politics, 2,000 listeners
inputs.target: City council transparency blog with 5,000 readers
inputs.proposal: Guest swap — I appear on their blog Q&A, they appear on my podcast
inputs.why_compatible: Same city, same audience interested in local government accountability

inputs.label: european
inputs.my_account: THE CORRESPONDENT — an English-language newsletter about Dutch and EU media policy, 11,000 subscribers
inputs.target: EURACTIV MEDIA — covering EU digital policy and media regulation, 28,000 subscribers. Just published a major analysis of the European Media Freedom Act.
inputs.proposal: Co-authored analysis piece published in both newsletters simultaneously
inputs.why_compatible: Both serve EU policy professionals but from different angles — mine is media-practitioner focused, theirs is policy-institution focused
inputs.prior_connection: We've quoted each other's work multiple times over the past year
